description: Tests if an outcome contains a specified color label. Used as a predicate inside event(). Can optionally target a specific factor position. When no position is given, matches any factor with the color value.
utility: Filter by color label in outcomes

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: 1-indexed factor position to check (optional; if omitted, checks all positions)

arguments.name: colorName
arguments.description: Color label string to match against outcome values

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), outcomes("red", "blue", "green"), repeat(2))
E = event(S, color("red"), fc(red))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), outcomes("red", "blue", "green"), repeat(2))
E = event(S, color(1, "blue"), fc(steelblue))
